applied_optimizations.name: Triton fused logsumexp+bias+multiply kernel
applied_optimizations.description: Use PyTorch MIOpen for ConvTranspose2d and mean reduction (already optimized), then fuse bias addition + logsumexp + multiply in a single Triton kernel. The Triton kernel processes channels in blocks using BLOCK_SIZE_C=128 (next_power_of_2(128)), with two-pass logsumexp for numerical stability.

attempted_but_failed.name: Full fusion including mean reduction
attempted_but_failed.error: Attempting to fuse mean reduction over spatial dims (512x512=262144 elements) into the Triton kernel caused significant slowdown due to nested loop overhead. The 2D block processing approach was 4x slower.

attempted_but_failed.name: Naive Triton kernel with spatial loops
attempted_but_failed.error: Initial attempt to do everything in Triton with nested loops over spatial dimensions was extremely inefficient compared to MIOpen's optimized ConvTranspose2d.

notes: ConvTranspose2d dominates at 82% of runtime - this is MIOpen's highly optimized assembly kernel that cannot be beaten by Triton
Theoretical maximum speedup is ~18% even if all other operations were free
Current approach: Use PyTorch for ConvTranspose2d and mean (MIOpen optimized), Triton for fused bias+logsumexp+multiply
Triton kernel itself is extremely fast (0.036ms, 0.1% of total time)
Key AMD constraints followed: wavefront=64 alignment, no tl.libdevice, use tl.math.exp, explicit float32 casts
BLOCK_SIZE_C=128 (next_power_of_2 of out_channels=128) aligns well with hardware

attempted_but_failed.name: trial_4
attempted_but_failed.reason: Trial 4 crashed with no output, same as trial 3. Two consecutive crashes indicate the agent's Triton kernel code has compilation or runtime errors on AMD. The agent must take a safer approach: start w

attempted_but_failed.name: trial_5
attempted_but_failed.reason: Trial 5 crashed with no output — 4th consecutive crash. The agent keeps writing Triton kernels that fail to compile on AMD. With 41 min left, the agent MUST start with a pure PyTorch ModelNew that rep
